---
title: "PlanetaryPy"
subtitle: "Core Tools for Planetary Science Data"
format:
  revealjs:
    theme: [dark, custom-slides.scss]
    transition: fade
    transition-speed: slow
    auto-animate: true
    loop: true
    # auto-slide: 10000
    # auto-slide-stoppable: false
    controls: false
    progress: true
    center: true
    hash: true
    code-line-numbers: false
    highlight-style: monokai
    width: 1280
    height: 720
---

## 90+ PDS Indexes {auto-animate="true" background-image="plpy_logo.svg" background-size="50%" background-opacity="0.08"}

```{.python}
from planetarypy import pds

pds.print_available_indexes()
```

```text
mro.ctx.edr
mro.hirise.edr
cassini.iss.ring_summary
lro.lroc.edr
go.ssi.raw
...
```

## One Line to a DataFrame {auto-animate="true" background-image="plpy_logo.svg" background-size="50%" background-opacity="0.08"}

```{.python}
df = pds.get_index("mro.ctx.edr")
cols = ["PRODUCT_ID", "IMAGE_TIME", "CENTER_LATITUDE", "CENTER_LONGITUDE"]
df[cols].tail()
```

<table style="font-size: 0.55em; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; border-collapse: collapse; width: 100%;">
<thead>
<tr style="border-bottom: 2px solid #666;">
<th style="color: #e6db74; padding: 4px 12px; text-align: left;">PRODUCT_ID</th>
<th style="color: #66d9ef; padding: 4px 12px; text-align: left;">IMAGE_TIME</th>
<th style="color: #a6e22e; padding: 4px 12px; text-align: right;">CENTER_LATITUDE</th>
<th style="color: #fd971f; padding: 4px 12px; text-align: right;">CENTER_LONGITUDE</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr><td style="color: #e6db74;">W04_090683_1413_XI_38S223W</td><td style="color: #66d9ef;">2025-11-30 08:58:40</td><td style="color: #a6e22e; text-align: right;">-38.81</td><td style="color: #fd971f; text-align: right;">223.11</td></tr>
<tr><td style="color: #e6db74;">W04_090685_1983_XN_18N282W</td><td style="color: #66d9ef;">2025-11-30 13:00:19</td><td style="color: #a6e22e; text-align: right;">18.32</td><td style="color: #fd971f; text-align: right;">282.56</td></tr>
<tr><td style="color: #e6db74;">W04_090687_2127_XI_32N341W</td><td style="color: #66d9ef;">2025-11-30 16:49:16</td><td style="color: #a6e22e; text-align: right;">32.68</td><td style="color: #fd971f; text-align: right;">341.34</td></tr>
<tr><td style="color: #e6db74;">W04_090688_1833_XN_03N002W</td><td style="color: #66d9ef;">2025-11-30 18:32:21</td><td style="color: #a6e22e; text-align: right;">3.28</td><td style="color: #fd971f; text-align: right;">2.18</td></tr>
<tr><td style="color: #e6db74;">W04_090690_1977_XI_17N060W</td><td style="color: #66d9ef;">2025-11-30 22:20:59</td><td style="color: #a6e22e; text-align: right;">17.70</td><td style="color: #fd971f; text-align: right;">60.23</td></tr>
</tbody>
</table>

::: {style="font-size: 0.5em; color: #888; margin-top: 0.3em;"}
164,103 rows x 51 columns — most recent: [W04_090690_1977_XI_17N060W.IMG](https://planetarydata.jpl.nasa.gov/img/data/mro/ctx/mrox_5508/data/W04_090690_1977_XI_17N060W.IMG)
:::

## Auto-Updating Cache {auto-animate="true" background-image="plpy_logo.svg" background-size="50%" background-opacity="0.08"}

```{.python}
# Checked daily, refreshed when stale
df = pds.get_index("mro.ctx.edr")

# Force refresh
df = pds.get_index("mro.ctx.edr",
                    allow_refresh=True)
```

::: {.highlight-box}
Parquet format: fast reads, datetime support, cloud-ready.
:::

## Dynamic URL Discovery {auto-animate="true" background-image="plpy_logo.svg" background-size="50%" background-opacity="0.08"}

```{.python}
from planetarypy.pds import Index

idx = Index("mro.ctx.edr")

# discovered automatically by scraping the PDS archive
idx.url
```
```text
'[...]/mro/ctx/mrox_5508/index/cumindex.lbl'
```

::: {.highlight-box}
No manual URL tracking needed.
:::

## PDS Catalog: 65 Missions {auto-animate="true" background-image="plpy_logo.svg" background-size="50%" background-opacity="0.08"}

```{.python}
from planetarypy.catalog import summary

summary()
```

<table style="font-size: 0.55em; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; border-collapse: collapse; width: 100%;">
<thead>
<tr style="border-bottom: 2px solid #666;">
<th style="color: #e6db74; padding: 4px 12px; text-align: left;">mission</th>
<th style="color: #66d9ef; padding: 4px 12px; text-align: right;">instruments</th>
<th style="color: #a6e22e; padding: 4px 12px; text-align: right;">product_types</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr><td style="color: #e6db74;">voyager</td><td style="color: #66d9ef; text-align: right;">12</td><td style="color: #a6e22e; text-align: right;">181</td></tr>
<tr><td style="color: #e6db74;">cassini</td><td style="color: #66d9ef; text-align: right;">16</td><td style="color: #a6e22e; text-align: right;">159</td></tr>
<tr><td style="color: #e6db74;">new_horizons</td><td style="color: #66d9ef; text-align: right;">9</td><td style="color: #a6e22e; text-align: right;">112</td></tr>
<tr><td style="color: #e6db74;">rosetta</td><td style="color: #66d9ef; text-align: right;">13</td><td style="color: #a6e22e; text-align: right;">103</td></tr>
<tr><td style="color: #e6db74;">lro</td><td style="color: #66d9ef; text-align: right;">8</td><td style="color: #a6e22e; text-align: right;">81</td></tr>
<tr><td style="color: #e6db74;">mro</td><td style="color: #66d9ef; text-align: right;">7</td><td style="color: #a6e22e; text-align: right;">44</td></tr>
<tr><td style="color: #e6db74;">...</td><td style="color: #66d9ef;"></td><td style="color: #a6e22e;"></td></tr>
</tbody>
</table>

::: {style="font-size: 0.5em; color: #888; margin-top: 0.3em;"}
65 missions, 420 instruments, 2042 product types
:::

## Mission Objects {auto-animate="true" background-image="plpy_logo.svg" background-size="50%" background-opacity="0.08"}

```{.python}
from planetarypy.catalog import Mission

mro = Mission("mro")
mro
```
```text
Mission('mro', 'Mars Reconnaissance Orbiter')
```

```{.python}
mro.instruments
```
```text
['crism', 'ctx', 'hirise', 'marci', 'mcs', 'rss', 'sharad']
```

```{.python}
mro["ctx"]
```
```text
Instrument('mro.ctx', 'Context Camera')
```

## Fetch Any Product {auto-animate="true" background-image="plpy_logo.svg" background-size="50%" background-opacity="0.08"}

```{.python}
from planetarypy.catalog import fetch_product

path = fetch_product(
    "mro.ctx.edr",
    "P01_001234_1800_XI_00N042W",
)
```
```text
~/planetarypy_data/mro/ctx/edr/P01_001234_1800_XI_00N042W
```

::: {.highlight-box}
DuckDB-backed. Search across all missions instantly.
:::

## 37 Archived SPICE Missions {auto-animate="true" background-image="plpy_logo.svg" background-size="50%" background-opacity="0.08"}

```{.python}
from planetarypy.spice import archived_kernels as ak

cols = ["Mission Name", "PDS3 or PDS4", "Start Time", "Stop Time"]
ak.datasets[cols].head()
```

<table style="font-size: 0.55em; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; border-collapse: collapse; width: 100%;">
<thead>
<tr style="border-bottom: 2px solid #666;">
<th style="color: #f92672; padding: 4px 12px; text-align: left;">shorthand</th>
<th style="color: #e6db74; padding: 4px 12px; text-align: left;">Mission Name</th>
<th style="color: #66d9ef; padding: 4px 12px; text-align: right;">PDS</th>
<th style="color: #a6e22e; padding: 4px 12px; text-align: left;">Start Time</th>
<th style="color: #fd971f; padding: 4px 12px; text-align: left;">Stop Time</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr><td style="color: #f92672;">bc</td><td style="color: #e6db74;">BepiColombo</td><td style="color: #66d9ef; text-align: right;">4</td><td style="color: #a6e22e;">2018-10-20</td><td style="color: #fd971f;">2025-05-31</td></tr>
<tr><td style="color: #f92672;">cassini</td><td style="color: #e6db74;">Cassini Orbiter</td><td style="color: #66d9ef; text-align: right;">3</td><td style="color: #a6e22e;">1997-10-15</td><td style="color: #fd971f;">2017-09-15</td></tr>
<tr><td style="color: #f92672;">dawn</td><td style="color: #e6db74;">DAWN</td><td style="color: #66d9ef; text-align: right;">3</td><td style="color: #a6e22e;">2007-09-27</td><td style="color: #fd971f;">2018-10-31</td></tr>
<tr><td style="color: #f92672;">juno</td><td style="color: #e6db74;">Juno</td><td style="color: #66d9ef; text-align: right;">3</td><td style="color: #a6e22e;">2011-08-05</td><td style="color: #fd971f;">2025-06-23</td></tr>
<tr><td style="color: #f92672;">mro</td><td style="color: #e6db74;">MRO</td><td style="color: #66d9ef; text-align: right;">3</td><td style="color: #a6e22e;">2005-08-12</td><td style="color: #fd971f;">2025-07-19</td></tr>
</tbody>
</table>

::: {style="font-size: 0.5em; color: #888; margin-top: 0.3em;"}
37 missions total
:::

## Download SPICE Subsets {auto-animate="true" background-image="plpy_logo.svg" background-size="50%" background-opacity="0.08"}

```{.python}
mk = ak.get_metakernel_and_files(
    "mro",
    start="2024-01-01",
    stop="2024-01-31",
) # returns functioning metakernel path
```

::: {.highlight-box}
Date-filtered kernel subsets via NAIF subsetter.

Metakernel path edited for local paths, immediately loadable with spiceypy.
:::

## Generic SPICE Kernels {auto-animate="true" background-image="plpy_logo.svg" background-size="50%" background-opacity="0.08"}

```{.python}
from planetarypy.spice.generic_kernels import (
    download_generic_kernels,
    load_generic_kernels,
)

download_generic_kernels()
load_generic_kernels()
```

::: {.highlight-box}
planetary constants / basic illumination calculations.
:::

## Zero Config {auto-animate="true" background-image="plpy_logo.svg" background-size="50%" background-opacity="0.08"}

```{.python}
from planetarypy.config import config

config.storage_root
# ~/planetarypy_data/
```

::: {.highlight-box}
Override with `PLANETARYPY_CONFIG` env var.
:::

## Get Started {auto-animate="true" background-image="plpy_logo.svg" background-size="50%" background-opacity="0.08"}

```{.bash}
pip install planetarypy
```

```{.python}
from planetarypy import pds

df = pds.get_index("cassini.iss.ring_summary")
```

::: {style="margin-top: 1.5em; font-size: 0.7em;"}
[github.com/planetarypy/planetarypy](https://github.com/planetarypy/planetarypy)
| BSD-3 License
| [planetarypy.org](https://planetarypy.org/)
:::
